Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1980 "BOFH-1980" -Di_table_addr=0x02 -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "BOFH - Servers Under Siege (Covert Bitops - 2002).prg"
Metadata.Notes: NOP'd out the calls to the kernal load routine ($FFD5) at $1EE3 and the kernal save routine ($FFD8) at $1F1A to remove disk access from the game (for high score loading and saving). Also copied the default high score table data to $0334-$0400 (this was originally loaded by the game from disk).
